description:
Is Andaman Island set to become Malaysia's next ghost city?

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/malaysias-building-another-multi-billion-dollar-mega-island

Additional footage and images courtesy of SCM Southern Corridor Malaysia, E&O, Elimelec Medina, Dariusz Kowalczyk / CC BY-SA 4.0 and CNA.

00:00 Intro
01:02 The Penang problem
02:21 Andaman Island
03:29 Land reclamation
06:27 Why build Andaman Island?
07:30 Forest City 2.0?

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/
